word_list.pronunciation: fɚðə sˈeɪk ʌv ˌɛsbˈiː slˈæʃ ˌɛstˌiːˈeɪtʃ

senses.definition: because of caring about someone or something and wanting to make a situation better for them

examples.x: He moved to the seaside for the sake of his health.
They stayed together for the sake of the children.

senses.definition: with the intention or aim of achieving a specific objective or goal

examples.x: She enrolled in a photography class for the purpose of improving her skills and pursuing her passion for capturing moments through images.
She enrolled in the course for the purpose of improving her language skills.
The committee was formed for the purpose of organizing the event.
He bought a new laptop for the purpose of increasing his productivity.
They conducted the survey for the purpose of gathering feedback from customers.

senses.definition: with the goal of providing help or support to someone or something

examples.x: She baked cookies and sold them in aid of the local animal shelter.
He wrote a book in aid of the literacy campaign.
She donated her hair in aid of the children with cancer.

senses.definition: motivated by a feeling of worry, care, or consideration for someone or something

examples.x: She canceled her plans out of concern for her friend's well-being and decided to stay with them during their time of need.
She called the doctor out of concern for her friend's health.
He took a day off work out of concern for his daughter, who was feeling unwell.
They postponed the event out of concern for the safety of the attendees.
He donated money to the charity out of concern for the welfare of homeless animals.

senses.definition: in the act of seeking, striving for, or trying to achieve something

examples.x: He dedicated countless hours in pursuit of his dream of becoming a professional athlete.
She traveled the world in pursuit of adventure and new experiences.
The team worked tirelessly in pursuit of the championship title.
They studied late into the night in pursuit of academic excellence.
The company invested significant resources in pursuit of innovation and growth.

senses.definition: with the expectation or desire for a particular outcome or result

examples.x: They submitted their job application in hopes of securing a position at the company.

senses.definition: with the expectation or desire for a positive outcome

examples.x: They started their business venture with hopes of achieving financial success and making a positive impact in their industry.
She applied for the scholarship with hopes of funding her education.
They started their own business with hopes of achieving financial independence.
He joined the team with hopes of winning the championship.
The couple bought a lottery ticket with hopes of hitting the jackpot.

senses.definition: with consideration for the benefit, well-being, or advantage of someone or something

examples.x: The company implemented new safety measures in the interest of protecting its employees from potential hazards.
The government passed new regulations in the interest of public health.
She shared her knowledge with others in the interest of helping them succeed.
He compromised in the interest of maintaining peace and harmony.
The organization made budget cuts in the interest of financial stability.

senses.definition: with the intention of achieving a specific goal or outcome
with a deliberate purpose or plan to accomplish a specific objective

examples.x: She bought a new laptop with the intention of using it for graphic design work and video editing.
He bought a gym membership with the intention of getting in shape.
They organized the meeting with the intention of resolving the issue.
The company launched the campaign with the intention of attracting new customers.
She started saving money with the intention of buying a house.
